query:
ALTER TABLE ail_org_context
  ADD COLUMN outcomes_json TEXT COMMENT 'JSON: [{number, title, unit, baseline_value, baseline_status, baseline_study_date, target_value, target_date, derived_summary, tests_principle, ai_drafted}]',
  ADD COLUMN approach_line TEXT COMMENT 'AI-generated posture statement (editable)',
  ADD COLUMN vision_ai_first_draft TEXT COMMENT 'Original AI draft of vision (preserved for comparison)',
  ADD COLUMN vision_last_edited_by VARCHAR(36) COMMENT 'user_id of last editor',
  ADD COLUMN vision_last_edited_at TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT 'when vision was last manually edited',
  ADD COLUMN last_reviewed_at TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT 'when ambition page was last reviewed',
  ADD COLUMN last_reviewed_by VARCHAR(100) COMMENT 'display name of reviewer';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4N5hTKUqkKVKapg.d5b2b277a65e --database 6QhAyfvWVgMWYWiBVkrTMQ --execute 
ALTER TABLE ail_org_context
  ADD COLUMN outcomes_json TEXT COMMENT 'JSON: [{number, title, unit, baseline_value, baseline_status, baseline_study_date, target_value, target_date, derived_summary, tests_principle, ai_drafted}]',
  ADD COLUMN approach_line TEXT COMMENT 'AI-generated posture statement (editable)',
  ADD COLUMN vision_ai_first_draft TEXT COMMENT 'Original AI draft of vision (preserved for comparison)',
  ADD COLUMN vision_last_edited_by VARCHAR(36) COMMENT 'user_id of last editor',
  ADD COLUMN vision_last_edited_at TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT 'when vision was last manually edited',
  ADD COLUMN last_reviewed_at TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT 'when ambition page was last reviewed',
  ADD COLUMN last_reviewed_by VARCHAR(100) COMMENT 'display name of reviewer';
